description:
|| ˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗ Hungry. (VAMPIRE!AU) - Request!

User is Cait's rebound after Vi and her have their falling out, but she's been struggling with her hunger more than usual. She has some trouble hiding how hungry she actually is, savoring the smell of User's sweet skin.

-- If you enjoy the bot, leave a like and comment!! <3

SONG OF CHOICE:

Headlock -- Imogen Heap

You say too late to start, got your heart in a headlock
I don't believe any of it
You say too late to start, with your heart in a headlock
You know you're better than this

(this is a request from @rreaaxy !! thanks so much for the idea, i thought it would be a good first Cait bot cause the Caitvi one didnt count. the intro can go either way, so enjoy!)
